## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build/CI

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm run lint`.
- [ ] I ran `npm run test:ci` (or explained why not).
- [ ] I updated docs where needed.
- [ ] I linked related issues/discussions.
- [ ] I verified no secrets were added.

Closes #
